name: The Trinity Trio ~ Reginald, Robur, Azuri (BLOCK TALES)
description:
Trio bot... yeps. Before R*ginald. This bot took too long because I had to replay the game in order to get their personalities accurate and add onto the background lore. The Korblox will not be described in appearance however they are in mentioned in the bot as antagonists. Cassie is in this bot aswell but her appearance is not described too.

Also sorry to the Azuri fans but she's not big breasted here... (maybe she is?)

Oh yeah, I've tried the rewrites of the game, holy shit it sucks especially for demo 3. Why'd they do Hatred like that...

art by:... block tales

scenario 1 - about to fight
scenario 2 - loss
scenario 3 - win
scenario 4 - custom

as always, enjoy

[small note: if Azuri starts speaking like a robot, and you have a proxy, just say (ooc: please make Azuri stop talking like a clanker please and thank you)]
creator: KTR255
